arts.ttl: Newcastle United player ratings as Bruno Guimaraes struggles and others slump to low marks
arts.sum: Newcastle United stumbled to a Monday night defeat against West Ham at St James' Park after some poor defending. West Ham went ahead on 10 minutes when Emerson Palmieri's corner was whipped in and Tomas Soucek was afforded a free header to steer it home near the penalty spot.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's ruthless £110million move as Newcastle United boss holds immediate inquest
arts.sum: Eddie Howe got ruthless with his Newcastle United players at St James' Park when hauling off £110million worth of talent in this miserable Monday night defeat to West Ham. But West Ham would strengthen their grip two minutes later as Jarrod Bowen slipped in Aaron Wan-Bissaka before the ex-Man United man was allowed to glide his way into the box before drilling the ball home to make it 2-0.

arts.ttl: West Ham break Newcastle’s spell to lift pressure on Julen Lopetegui
arts.sum: Newcastle 0-2 West Ham: Lopetegui’s side were lethal on the break as Eddie Howe’s team were culpable for both goals

arts.ttl: St James' shocked! West Ham beat out-of-sorts Newcastle
arts.sum: Highlights from the Premier League match between Newcastle United and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: West Ham beat Newcastle, ease Lopetegui pressure
arts.sum: West Ham United eased the pressure on new manager Julen Lopetegui with a surprise 2-0 victory away to in-form Newcastle United in the Premier League on Monday.

arts.ttl: Newcastle 0-2 West Ham: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Hammers claim crucial Premier League victory
arts.sum: Tomas Soucek and Aaron Wan-Bissaka grab a goal apiece to record a 2-0 victory over Newcastle United at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Wan-Bissaka wraps up West Ham win at Newcastle to ease Lopetegui pressure
arts.athr: Louise Taylor at St James’ Park
arts.sum: On a bitterly cold Tyneside night West Ham finally remembered how to fight back. Even better for their beleaguered manager, Julen Lopetegui, a team inspired by standout performances from Tomas Soucek and Jarrod Bowen exhibited the sort of ruthless precision strangely absent from Newcastle’s game. Expertly taken goals from Soucek and Aaron Wan-Bissaka reinforced Lopetegui’s fragile job security, lifting West Ham to 14th, three points behind Eddie Howe’s team, as Newcastle’s hopes of Champions League qualification sustained a dent. arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui pulled back from the brink of sack as near perfect West Ham beat Newcastle
arts.sum: NEWCASTLE 0-2 WEST HAM: Goals from Tomas Soucek and Aaron Wan-Bissaka earned West Ham a fine victory at St James' Park on a night their manager was under pressure

arts.ttl: West Ham player ratings vs Newcastle: Aaron Wan-Bissaka electric as Carlos Soler proves point in vital win
arts.sum: Several of Julen Lopetegui’s raft of summer signings impress to deliver a rousing victory that eases pressure on the manager
